phpbotgram

Phpbotgram-Documentation

Getting started

  • Installation
  • Your first bot
  • Handlers and filters
  • Adding state
  • Deployment

How-to recipes

  • Add a custom filter
  • Pass kwargs from a filter to the handler
  • Build a wizard with scenes
  • Handle deep-link /start payloads
  • Track chat-member transitions
  • Use Redis or MongoDB for FSM storage
  • Plug in a custom storage backend
  • Upload and download files
  • Send a media group (album)
  • Show "typing…" while a slow handler runs
  • Sell something via Telegram Stars
  • Validate Web App initData
  • Serve webhooks without amphp/http-server
  • Run multiple bots from one process
  • Rate-limit outgoing API calls
  • Acknowledge callback queries cleanly
  • Run code outside the dispatcher
  • Handle errors globally
  • Test bots with the MockedSession
  • Internationalise message payloads

Concepts

  • Bot and Session
  • Dispatcher
  • Routers
  • Middlewares
  • Flags
  • Filters
  • F-DSL
  • CallbackData
  • FSM
  • Scenes
  • Webhook
  • Keyboards
  • Text decoration
  • Error model
  • Serialization
  • Architecture decisions

Indices

Files

  • Gruven
  • PhpBotGram

Bot
in package
  • Application
implements BotShortcutsContract uses BotShortcuts

Bot.php : 273

Bot facade.

Provides one wrapper per Telegram API method, plus the hand-coded constructor / __invoke dispatch entry-point preserved from Phase 1.

Table of Contents

Interfaces

BotShortcutsContract

Properties

$defaultProperties  : DefaultBotProperties
$session  : BaseSession
$token  : string
$cachedId  : int|null
$cachedMe  : User|null
$currentBotLocals  : array<class-string, FiberLocal<string|int, Bot|null>>
Per-class FiberLocal slots, keyed by `static::class`. A trait-level `private static ?FiberLocal` would otherwise collapse across the using class hierarchy (Bot + MockedBot would share one slot).

download()  : string|null
Mirrors aiogram's `bot.download(file: str | Downloadable, ...)`. A bare `string` is treated as a `file_id` and resolved via `getFile` before downloading; a `Downloadable` (Document/Photo/Voice/etc) is unwrapped via its `fileId()` method.

download()

BotShortcuts.php : 126

Mirrors aiogram's `bot.download(file: str | Downloadable, ...)`. A bare `string` is treated as a `file_id` and resolved via `getFile` before downloading; a `Downloadable` (Document/Photo/Voice/etc) is unwrapped via its `fileId()` method.

public download(Downloadable|string $object[, mixed $destination = null ][, int $timeout = 30 ][, int $chunkSize = 65536 ]) : string|null
Parameters
$object : Downloadable|string
$destination : mixed = null
$timeout : int = 30
$chunkSize : int = 65536
Return values
string|null

downloadFile()

BotShortcuts.php : 109
public downloadFile(File|string $fileOrPath[, mixed $destination = null ][, int $timeout = 30 ][, int $chunkSize = 65536 ]) : string|null
Parameters
$fileOrPath : File|string
$destination : mixed = null
$timeout : int = 30
$chunkSize : int = 65536
Return values
string|null
